rules.description: Interchange sender identification in UNB header
Interchange recipient identification in UNB header
Unique message reference number in UNH header
Message type identifier (e.g., IFTMIN or IFCSUM) in UNH header
Document/message name code identifying the type of message
Date/time/period at header level for message creation date
Consignment/transport document number at SG25 shipment level. Mandatory.
Expected delivery date at shipment level (SG25). Up to 3 occurrences. Conditional.
Free text consignment remarks at SG25 shipment level. Qualifiers: CCI (Custom Remarks), AAU (Duty Free Import Remarks). Up to 9 occurrences.
Monetary amount at shipment level (SG25) for declared customs value, COD, or insurance. Up to 4 occurrences.
Reference numbers at shipment level (SG32). Up to 999 occurrences.
Commercial Invoice Reference Number at invoice-level SG32. Required. Up to 999 occurrences. MRN uses qualifier ABT (not 'MRN').
MRN (Movement Reference Number) qualifier at invoice-level SG32. Must use ABT, not MRN. Per change report v1.3.3.
Terms of delivery / product features at SG31 level. See Appendix B for product feature codes. Includes LBBX service codes.
Account Number within TOD segment. Added per change report v1.1.
Location related to incoterms at SG31 level. Up to 1 occurrence following TOD. DHL Express Facility Codes per v1.3.8.
Governmental procedures for import/export at SG33 level. 1 occurrence. At invoice level indicates Document Function.
Accompanying documents for customs clearance at SG34 level. 1 occurrence per SG34. Followed by DTM for document date.
Consignee/Importer/Exporter name and address at SG43 level. Required. Up to 9 occurrences. Supports NAD+JD for Port of Entry (LBBX).
Port of Entry address using NAD+JD qualifier at SG43 level. DHL-specific. Conditional for LBBX shipments. Added v0.8.
Contact person name for delivery at SG44 level (nested under SG43 NAD). Up to 9 occurrences.
Communication contact at SG44 level. Up to 9 occurrences. Qualifiers: TEL (telephone), EML (email), FAX (fax), AL (mobile).
Communication type qualifier. TEL=telephone, EML=email, FAX=fax, AL=mobile phone. AL added per v0.8.
Party reference numbers (e.g., VAT number) at SG47 level for Consignee/Importer/Exporter. Conditional.
Goods item identification at SG50 piece level. Mandatory. 1 occurrence. Also appears at invoice line item level.
Piece weight/measurements at SG52 level. Required. Up to 9 occurrences. Default unit: KGM (Kilograms), also LBR (Pounds).
Weight measurement unit. KGM=Kilograms (default), LBR=Pounds.
Piece dimensions (L x W x H) at SG53 level. Required. 1 occurrence.
Dimension unit. CMT=Centimeters (default), MTR=Meters, INH=Inches.
Volume unit. MTQ=Cubic Meters (default), CMQ=Cubic Centimeters, INQ=Cubic Inches.
Piece reference number at SG54 level. Conditional. Up to 9 occurrences.
Package markings at SG55 piece level. Required. 1 occurrence. Accompanied by GIN for barcoded identification.
Bar coded goods identification number accompanying PCI at piece level.
Invoice-level monetary amounts at SG25. Required. Up to 99 occurrences. Includes customs value, COD, insurance, duty/tax (Perfect Invoice per v1.3.6).
Interchange sender identification in UNB header
Interchange receiver identification in UNB header
Creation date/time of the message at header level. Up to 2 occurrences. Also used at shipment level for expected delivery date.
SG4 - Consignor name and address at header level. Required, up to 3 occurrences. Contains account numbers, names and addresses.
DHL customer account number included within the consignor NAD segment at SG4 header level.
SG5 - Contact person within the consignor party at header level. Conditional, up to 9 occurrences.
SG5 - Communication number of contact person at consignor header level. Conditional, up to 9 occurrences. Qualifiers: TEL, EML, FAX, AL (mobile/MOB).
SG6 - Registration numbers (e.g. VAT number) of consignor at header level. Conditional, up to 9 occurrences. RFF/C506/1156 added in v1.2.
SG25 - DHL product type for transport service requirements at shipment level. Required, 1 occurrence. Codes defined in Appendix A.
SG31 - Terms of delivery / Incoterms at shipment level. Required, 1 occurrence. Also appears at invoice level. Element 4052:2 added for Account Number in v1.1.
SG25 Invoice level - Free text for supplementary information such as reason for export. Conditional, up to 9 occurrences.
SG33 Invoice level - Free text for trading transaction type as supplementary information related to governmental procedures. Conditional, up to 9 occurrences. Follows GOR segment.

interchange_sender.description: Interchange sender identification in UNB header

interchange_recipient.description: Interchange recipient identification in UNB header

message_reference_number.description: Unique message reference number in UNH header

message_type.description: Message type identifier (e.g., IFTMIN or IFCSUM) in UNH header

beginning_of_message.description: Document/message name code identifying the type of message

message_creation_date.description: Date/time/period at header level for message creation date

consignment_number.description: Consignment/transport document number at SG25 shipment level. Mandatory.

expected_delivery_date.description: Expected delivery date at shipment level (SG25). Up to 3 occurrences. Conditional.

consignment_remarks.description: Free text consignment remarks at SG25 shipment level. Qualifiers: CCI (Custom Remarks), AAU (Duty Free Import Remarks). Up to 9 occurrences.

declared_customs_value.description: Monetary amount at shipment level (SG25) for declared customs value, COD, or insurance. Up to 4 occurrences.

shipment_reference_number.description: Reference numbers at shipment level (SG32). Up to 999 occurrences.

invoice_reference_number.description: Commercial Invoice Reference Number at invoice-level SG32. Required. Up to 999 occurrences. MRN uses qualifier ABT (not 'MRN').

invoice_reference_mrn_qualifier.description: MRN (Movement Reference Number) qualifier at invoice-level SG32. Must use ABT, not MRN. Per change report v1.3.3.

product_features.description: Terms of delivery / product features at SG31 level. See Appendix B for product feature codes. Includes LBBX service codes.

product_features_account_number.description: Account Number within TOD segment. Added per change report v1.1.

incoterm_location.description: Location related to incoterms at SG31 level. Up to 1 occurrence following TOD. DHL Express Facility Codes per v1.3.8.

governmental_procedures.description: Governmental procedures for import/export at SG33 level. 1 occurrence. At invoice level indicates Document Function.

accompanying_documents.description: Accompanying documents for customs clearance at SG34 level. 1 occurrence per SG34. Followed by DTM for document date.

consignee_name_and_address.description: Consignee/Importer/Exporter name and address at SG43 level. Required. Up to 9 occurrences. Supports NAD+JD for Port of Entry (LBBX).

port_of_entry_address.description: Port of Entry address using NAD+JD qualifier at SG43 level. DHL-specific. Conditional for LBBX shipments. Added v0.8.

consignee_contact_name.description: Contact person name for delivery at SG44 level (nested under SG43 NAD). Up to 9 occurrences.

consignee_communication_contact.description: Communication contact at SG44 level. Up to 9 occurrences. Qualifiers: TEL (telephone), EML (email), FAX (fax), AL (mobile).

consignee_communication_qualifier.description: Communication type qualifier. TEL=telephone, EML=email, FAX=fax, AL=mobile phone. AL added per v0.8.

consignee_reference_numbers.description: Party reference numbers (e.g., VAT number) at SG47 level for Consignee/Importer/Exporter. Conditional.

goods_item_details.description: Goods item identification at SG50 piece level. Mandatory. 1 occurrence. Also appears at invoice line item level.

piece_weight.description: Piece weight/measurements at SG52 level. Required. Up to 9 occurrences. Default unit: KGM (Kilograms), also LBR (Pounds).

piece_dimensions.description: Piece dimensions (L x W x H) at SG53 level. Required. 1 occurrence.

piece_volume_unit.description: Volume unit. MTQ=Cubic Meters (default), CMQ=Cubic Centimeters, INQ=Cubic Inches.

piece_reference_number.description: Piece reference number at SG54 level. Conditional. Up to 9 occurrences.

package_identification.description: Package markings at SG55 piece level. Required. 1 occurrence. Accompanied by GIN for barcoded identification.

goods_identity_number.description: Bar coded goods identification number accompanying PCI at piece level.

invoice_monetary_amounts.description: Invoice-level monetary amounts at SG25. Required. Up to 99 occurrences. Includes customs value, COD, insurance, duty/tax (Perfect Invoice per v1.3.6).

sender_id.description: Interchange sender identification in UNB header

receiver_id.description: Interchange receiver identification in UNB header

ship_date.description: Creation date/time of the message at header level. Up to 2 occurrences. Also used at shipment level for expected delivery date.

shipper_name_and_address.description: SG4 - Consignor name and address at header level. Required, up to 3 occurrences. Contains account numbers, names and addresses.

shipper_account_number.description: DHL customer account number included within the consignor NAD segment at SG4 header level.

shipper_contact_name.description: SG5 - Contact person within the consignor party at header level. Conditional, up to 9 occurrences.

shipper_communication_contact.description: SG5 - Communication number of contact person at consignor header level. Conditional, up to 9 occurrences. Qualifiers: TEL, EML, FAX, AL (mobile/MOB).

shipper_vat_number.description: SG6 - Registration numbers (e.g. VAT number) of consignor at header level. Conditional, up to 9 occurrences. RFF/C506/1156 added in v1.2.

product_type.description: SG25 - DHL product type for transport service requirements at shipment level. Required, 1 occurrence. Codes defined in Appendix A.

terms_of_delivery.description: SG31 - Terms of delivery / Incoterms at shipment level. Required, 1 occurrence. Also appears at invoice level. Element 4052:2 added for Account Number in v1.1.

reason_for_export.description: SG25 Invoice level - Free text for supplementary information such as reason for export. Conditional, up to 9 occurrences.

trading_transaction_type.description: SG33 Invoice level - Free text for trading transaction type as supplementary information related to governmental procedures. Conditional, up to 9 occurrences. Follows GOR segment.
